commands.name: set-quiet
commands.description: Set the default value for the Quiet option. Settings are saved in the user configuration file.

arguments.name: value
arguments.description: true to enable Quiet mode by default, false to disable

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Hide source documents in the comparison view. Default can be set via 'set-quiet' command

arguments.name: path1
arguments.description: Path to the first Word document

arguments.name: path2
arguments.description: Path to the second Word document
